_comment: CMIP6 second-pass PDF extraction state. Each batch = 1-3 models, max 4 agents, ~150k tokens. Restart any batch with resumeFromRunId.

batches.label: MRI-ESM2-0
batches.note: O=＋exc already confirmed (MRI-CCM2.1 interactive). Do not change O.

batches.label: IPSL-CM6A-LR
batches.note: O=✓std already confirmed. Hourdin2020 is the primary; Szopa2012 is CMIP5 predecessor for aerosol lineage.

batches.label: ACCESS-ESM1-5 (all-?)
batches.note: Aerosol scheme confirmed as CLASSIC v1.0 (NOT GLOMAP-mode). Ziehn2020 is primary CMIP6 paper.

batches.label: CAMS-CSM1-0
batches.note: G=✓std already confirmed (Meinshausen2017). Do not change G.

batches.label: MIROC6 (verification pass)
batches.note: All verdicts ✓std from prior pass. This is a VERIFICATION — confirm VL=✓std (Thomason/IACETH), confirm SPRINTARS driven by CMIP6-standard emissions. Update only if corrections found.

batches.label: MIROC-ES2L + MIROC-ES2H (Fe-dep + confirm)
batches.note: MIROC-ES2L all ✓std confirmed except Fe-dep. MIROC-ES2H verdicts inferred from ES2L — need confirmation or note of Watanabe2021 gap.

batches.label: GFDL-CM4 + GFDL-ESM4 (LU + VL)
batches.note: Most components ✓std. Only LU and VL unknown for CM4. ESM4 also needs N-dep and CO2 mode. Dunne2012 is GFDL-ESM2 (CMIP5) for lineage context.

batches.label: ACCESS-CM2 (MD only) + TaiESM1 (G/O/LU/SO/VL)
batches.note: ACCESS-CM2: only MD=? remaining (GLOMAP-mode dust treatment). TaiESM1: aerosols=~ (SNAP) confirmed; need G/O/LU/SO/VL. Lee2020 describes CMIP5-style run — flag if CMIP6 forcing not explicit.

batches.label: BCC-CSM2-MR (MD/SS/N-dep/CO2-mode)
batches.note: G/O/SD/BC/OC/LU/SO/VL=✓std confirmed. SI=✗dev confirmed (CMIP5-Taylor2012 masses). Wu2019 (CMIP5→CMIP6 progress) is primary. Wu2014 is lineage context. Wu2020(BCC-ESM1) and Wu2021(BCC-CSM2-HR) are out-of-scope models — use for aerosol framework context only.

batches.label: MPI-ESM1-2-LR + HR + HAM (G/SO/VL)
batches.note: All three use ECHAM6.3 atmosphere. CMIP5 papers — check if Matthes2017 solar and IACETH volcanic were adopted for CMIP6. Note clearly if inference is tenuous.

batches.label: GISS E2-1-G + E2-2-G + E3-G (G/SO/VL and E2-2/E3 gaps)
batches.note: CMIP5 papers for GISS-E2. GISS-E2-1-G O=✗dev confirmed. E2-2-G and E3-G are newer CMIP6 variants — CMIP5 papers may give lineage clues only. Flag inference uncertainty explicitly.

batches.label: EC-Earth3-ESM-1 (all-?)
batches.note: EC-Earth3 base (IFS atmosphere) has G/O/aerosols/LU/SO all ✓std. Question: does ESM-1 share this or is it separately described? PISCES-v2 ocean BGC confirmed. Check Doscher2022 specifically for ESM-1.

batches.label: CNRM family (G/MD/SS/LU/SO/VL gaps)
batches.note: O/SD/BC/OC confirmed for all three. CMIP5 paper — note clearly if inference from CNRM-CM5.1 to CM6-1 is tenuous. CNRM may have adopted Matthes2017/IACETH for CMIP6.

batches.label: FGOALS-g3 + FGOALS-f3-L remaining gaps
batches.note: FGOALS-g3 O=✓std confirmed. FGOALS-f3-L G/O/SO confirmed. CMIP5 predecessor papers — flag uncertainty explicitly.

batches.label: FIO-ESM-2-0 + INM-CM5-0 remaining gaps
batches.note: FIO-ESM-2-0: all ? — CAM5.3 lineage. Qiao2013 is FIO-ESM v1 (CMIP5). INM-CM5-0: G/O/SO/VL=✓std, SD/BC/OC/SI=✗dev (INM-AER1) confirmed. Only LU + INM-AER1 MD/SS treatment unknown.
